name: tech-docs
description: Write technical docs (architecture overviews, feature designs, runbooks, getting-started guides, READMEs, tech-debt notes, how-tos, implementation plans, RFCs, and more). Asks the doc type and audience first, runs targeted clarifying questions one at a time, then drafts in plain language with structured markdown and pastel mermaid diagrams where they help. Output is humanised, with no AI tells.
